title: Vocabulary Drill
task: Revise 10 words with synonym, antonym and one sentence.

title: Grammar Accuracy
task: Solve 5 grammar or sentence-correction questions and review the rule.

title: Quantitative Practice
task: Solve one small set from percentages, ratios, averages or algebra.

title: Reasoning Set
task: Solve one analytical or logical reasoning set using a diagram or rule list.

title: Subject Concept
task: Revise one science, math, computer or GK concept and attempt related MCQs.

title: Mini Mock or Review
task: Attempt a mini mock or review mistakes from your previous mock.

title: Progress Check
task: Check topic accuracy and choose one weak area for tomorrow.
